requirement_topic.en: Australian Bicycle Classification — Pedalec EN 15194 ≤250 W
requirement_topic.zh: 澳大利亚自行车分类——符合EN 15194且≤250W的pedalec
requirement_topic.zht: 澳洲自行車分類——符合EN 15194且≤250W的pedalec

summary.en: Australia recognises a pedalec pathway for electric bicycles where the cycle complies with EN 15194, has a maximum continuous rated power of 250 W, and motor assistance is pedal-linked and cuts out at the EN 15194 limit. This classification is used in state and territory road-rule frameworks to treat compliant pedalecs as bicycles rather than motorcycles or mopeds. EN 15194 is the referenced technical classification route; it is not a standalone Australian product approval issued by the ACCC.
summary.zh: 澳大利亚承认电动自行车的pedalec路径：车辆符合EN 15194，最大连续额定功率为250W，电机助力与踩踏关联并按EN 15194限值断开。各州和领地道路规则框架使用该分类，将合规pedalec按自行车而非摩托车或轻便摩托车处理。EN 15194是被引用的技术分类路径，并非ACCC签发的独立澳大利亚产品批准。
summary.zht: 澳洲承認電動自行車的pedalec路徑：車輛符合EN 15194，最大連續額定功率為250W，電機助力與踩踏關聯並按EN 15194限值斷開。各州和領地道路規則框架使用該分類，將合規pedalec按自行車而非摩托車或輕便摩托車處理。EN 15194是被引用的技術分類路徑，並非ACCC簽發的獨立澳洲產品批准。

standards_or_laws: EN 15194 — Cycles — Electrically power assisted cycles — EPAC Bicycles
National Transport Commission (Road Transport Legislation - Australian Road Rules) Regulations 2006 — model Australian Road Rules as adopted or adapted by states and territories

gap.en: The key China-to-Australia classification gap is motor power. GB 17761-2018 permits motors up to 400 W, but the Australian pedalec pathway is tied to EN 15194 at 250 W continuous rated power. A Chinese 251-400 W e-bike, throttle-only model, or vehicle with assistance not controlled as a pedalec can fall outside the bicycle pathway and may require motor-vehicle treatment, registration, licensing, or may be illegal for road use depending on the jurisdiction.
gap.zh: 中国进入澳大利亚的主要分类差距是电机功率。GB 17761-2018允许电机最高400W，但澳大利亚pedalec路径与EN 15194的250W连续额定功率绑定。中国251-400W电动自行车、纯油门车型或助力控制不符合pedalec逻辑的车辆，可能超出自行车路径，并可能按机动车处理、要求登记和驾驶资格，或在特定辖区道路使用违法。
gap.zht: 中國進入澳洲的主要分類差距是電機功率。GB 17761-2018允許電機最高400W，但澳洲pedalec路徑與EN 15194的250W連續額定功率綁定。中國251-400W電動自行車、純油門車型或助力控制不符合pedalec邏輯的車輛，可能超出自行車路徑，並可能按機動車處理、要求登記和駕駛資格，或在特定轄區道路使用違法。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for bicycle road-use classification where adopted by state or territory road rules; EN 15194 is the referenced technical route for pedalecs ≤250W
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17761-2018 under SAMR for electric bicycles sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] This is a material compliance gap: the China GB 17761 power ceiling can exceed the Australian EN 15194 pedalec pathway at 250 W continuous rated power. Models above that limit, throttle-only designs, or non-pedalec assistance controls should be redesigned or classified through the correct AU road-use pathway before supply.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 这是实质性合规差距：中国GB 17761功率上限可能超过澳大利亚EN 15194 pedalec路径的250W连续额定功率。超过该限值、纯油门设计或不符合pedalec助力控制的车型，应在供应前重新设计或按正确的澳大利亚道路使用路径分类。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 這是實質性合規差距：中國GB 17761功率上限可能超過澳洲EN 15194 pedalec路徑的250W連續額定功率。超過該限值、純油門設計或不符合pedalec助力控制的車型，應在供應前重新設計或按正確的澳洲道路使用路徑分類。

source.publisher: Federal Register of Legislation — National Transport Commission (Road Transport Legislation - Australian Road Rules) Regulations 2006

summary.en: China's GB 17761-2018 allows electric bicycles with maximum speed ≤25 km/h, motor power ≤400 W, mass limits, and pedals. The speed and pedal concepts overlap with Australian pedalec treatment, but the 400 W Chinese power ceiling exceeds the Australian pedalec 250 W limit and the traditional power-assisted pedal cycle 200 W limit.
summary.zh: 中国GB 17761-2018允许电动自行车最高车速≤25km/h、电机功率≤400W，并设置整车质量和脚踏要求。速度和脚踏概念与澳大利亚pedalec处理有重叠，但中国400W功率上限高于澳大利亚pedalec的250W限值及传统助力脚踏车的200W限值。
summary.zht: 中國GB 17761-2018允許電動自行車最高車速≤25km/h、電機功率≤400W，並設置整車質量和腳踏要求。速度和腳踏概念與澳洲pedalec處理有重疊，但中國400W功率上限高於澳洲pedalec的250W限值及傳統助力腳踏車的200W限值。

standards_or_laws: GB 17761-2018 — Safety Technical Specification for Electric Bicycles (SAMR, mandatory)

requirement_topic.en: Traditional Power-Assisted Pedal Cycle — Auxiliary Motor ≤200 W
requirement_topic.zh: 传统助力脚踏车——辅助电机≤200W
requirement_topic.zht: 傳統助力腳踏車——輔助電機≤200W

summary.en: Australian road-rule frameworks also retain a traditional power-assisted pedal cycle category with one or more auxiliary motors whose combined maximum power output does not exceed 200 W. This route is separate from the EN 15194 pedalec route. It is relevant for low-powered assist bicycles and for state-road-rule classification, not for proving full product electrical or battery safety.
summary.zh: 澳大利亚道路规则框架还保留传统助力脚踏车类别，即一个或多个辅助电机的合计最大输出功率不超过200W。该路径独立于EN 15194 pedalec路径，主要用于低功率助力自行车及州道路规则分类，并不等同于证明整车电气或电池安全。
summary.zht: 澳洲道路規則框架還保留傳統助力腳踏車類別，即一個或多個輔助電機的合計最大輸出功率不超過200W。該路徑獨立於EN 15194 pedalec路徑，主要用於低功率助力自行車及州道路規則分類，並不等同於證明整車電氣或電池安全。

standards_or_laws: National Transport Commission (Road Transport Legislation - Australian Road Rules) Regulations 2006 — power-assisted pedal cycle model rules
State and territory road rules implementing bicycle and power-assisted pedal cycle definitions

gap.en: A Chinese GB 17761 model can comply domestically at up to 400 W but fail both Australian bicycle pathways: above 200 W it may fail the traditional power-assisted pedal cycle route, and above 250 W it fails the pedalec EN 15194 route. Export specifications should lock motor controller output, nameplate rating, firmware, and throttle behaviour to the intended AU pathway before shipment.
gap.zh: 中国GB 17761车型在国内可按最高400W合规，但可能同时不符合澳大利亚两条自行车路径：超过200W即可能不符合传统助力脚踏车路径，超过250W即不符合pedalec EN 15194路径。出口规格应在出货前锁定电机控制器输出、铭牌额定值、固件和油门行为，以匹配目标澳大利亚路径。
gap.zht: 中國GB 17761車型在國內可按最高400W合規，但可能同時不符合澳洲兩條自行車路徑：超過200W即可能不符合傳統助力腳踏車路徑，超過250W即不符合pedalec EN 15194路徑。出口規格應在出貨前鎖定電機控制器輸出、銘牌額定值、韌體和油門行為，以匹配目標澳洲路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the supplier relies on the ≤200W power-assisted pedal cycle category under applicable state or territory road rules
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17761-2018 permits a higher ≤400W ceiling for the China domestic e-bike category

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] This is a material compliance gap: GB 17761 has no direct Australian-style 200 W power-assisted pedal cycle category, and 200-400 W China-market models may fail this AU route. Motor output, nameplate rating, firmware and throttle behaviour should be locked to the intended Australian pathway before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 这是实质性合规差距：GB 17761没有与澳大利亚200W助力脚踏车类别直接对应的路径，面向中国市场的200-400W车型可能不符合该澳大利亚路径。出货前应将电机输出、铭牌额定值、固件和油门行为锁定到目标澳大利亚路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 這是實質性合規差距：GB 17761沒有與澳洲200W助力腳踏車類別直接對應的路徑，面向中國市場的200-400W車型可能不符合該澳洲路徑。出貨前應將電機輸出、銘牌額定值、韌體和油門行為鎖定到目標澳洲路徑。

source.publisher: Federal Register of Legislation — National Transport Commission (Road Transport Legislation - Australian Road Rules) Regulations 2006

summary.en: GB 17761-2018 has no direct Australian-style 200 W category. A China domestic e-bike test report should therefore be reviewed against the AU motor-output pathway rather than treated as transferable classification evidence.
summary.zh: GB 17761-2018没有与澳大利亚200W类别直接对应的路径。因此，中国国内电动自行车测试报告应按澳大利亚电机输出路径重新审查，而不能视为可直接转用的分类证据。
summary.zht: GB 17761-2018沒有與澳洲200W類別直接對應的路徑。因此，中國國內電動自行車測試報告應按澳洲電機輸出路徑重新審查，而不能視為可直接轉用的分類證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 17761-2018 — Safety Technical Specification for Electric Bicycles (SAMR, mandatory)
